findings.location: src/commands/wallet.ts:118-120 (code comment, pre-existing — not touched by commit f78baa9)
findings.description: The inline code comment above the `activeBalanceUnavailableReason` wiring still reads "REQ-DX-023: same balanceUnavailableReason convention as `status` below", which is now stale: the corrected REQ-DX-023 (behavioral-spec.md) explicitly documents that `activeBalanceUnavailableReason` is a DIFFERENT, deliberately-active-prefixed field name from `status`'s bare `balanceUnavailableReason`, not the 'same convention'. This is a documentation-only drift (src/ was correctly left untouched by this fix, and the shipped behavior is correct and now spec-matched/tested), not a behavioral or spec-coverage defect.
findings.remediation: Non-blocking. Optionally update the comment wording in a future touch of this file to match the corrected REQ-DX-023 rationale (active-prefixed name is intentional, not 'the same' as status's).
